title: Simple Rose Gold
description: a mod that adds a new ingot ,decoration blocks and a new progression level with rose gold
body:
Have you ever notice a big gap between diamond tools to iron, so wanted something that can fill that place, don't worry that with Simple rose gold your problem is solved , with simple gold rose you get a simple new ingot, Rose Gold ! , crafted with 1 raw gold end 3 raw coppers it can be smelted in a blast furnice to make rose gold that can be used to make tools with the double of durability of iron tools end gold level of enchentability
This mod also adds a few building blocks being them, the rose bricks with slabs end stairs , chiseled rose block, Cut rose Block end Rose Gold Door and new use to beetroot with an rose gold beetroot that gives you speed end haste when consumed ....

Quite simple innit ?

-1.0.1

New textures : all rose gold blocks ,rose gold door and new texture for armor

All new rose gold bundle : can store up to 15 itens , open it by right click (crafted with 1 rabbit hide end 5 rose gold ingots)
